---
title: "UpSetR"
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-18"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
#install.packages("UpSetR")
library(UpSetR)
library(here)
library(dplyr)
```

```{r}

# ============================================
# Load all five results files
# ============================================

male_placenta_5uM   <- read_csv(here("output", "placenta", "male_differential_expression_5um_26.csv"))
male_placenta_20uM  <- read_csv(here("output", "placenta", "male_differential_expression_20um_26.csv"))
female_placenta_5uM  <- read_csv(here("output", "placenta", "female_differential_expression_5um_26.csv"))
female_placenta_20uM <- read_csv(here("output", "placenta", "female_differential_expression_20um_26.csv"))
cells_5um <- read_csv(here("output", "cells", "results_cells_5.csv"))
```

```{r}
if (!require("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE))
    install.packages("BiocManager")

BiocManager::install("org.Hs.eg.db")
BiocManager::install("AnnotationDbi")
```

```{r}
library(AnnotationDbi)
library(org.Hs.eg.db)
library(dplyr)  # load last so dplyr::select wins

# Re-run annotation
gene_annotations <- AnnotationDbi::select(   # explicit namespace for AnnotationDbi
  org.Hs.eg.db,
  keys    = all_deg_genes,
  columns = c("SYMBOL", "GENENAME", "ENTREZID"),
  keytype = "SYMBOL"
) %>%
  dplyr::rename(gene = SYMBOL)

# Now dplyr::select will work correctly in the rest of the code
up_annotated <- upset_up %>%
  left_join(gene_annotations, by = "gene") %>%
  mutate(
    n_comparisons = rowSums(across(all_of(sets))),
    shared = ifelse(n_comparisons > 1, "Shared", "Unique")
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(n_comparisons), gene) %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, GENENAME, all_of(sets), n_comparisons, shared)

dn_annotated <- upset_dn %>%
  left_join(gene_annotations, by = "gene") %>%
  mutate(
    n_comparisons = rowSums(across(all_of(sets))),
    shared = ifelse(n_comparisons > 1, "Shared", "Unique")
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(n_comparisons), gene) %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, GENENAME, all_of(sets), n_comparisons, shared)

# Print shared genes with annotations
cat("=== SHARED UPREGULATED GENES (>1 comparison) ===\n")
up_annotated %>% filter(shared == "Shared") %>% as.data.frame() %>% print()

cat("\n=== SHARED DOWNREGULATED GENES (>1 comparison) ===\n")
dn_annotated %>% filter(shared == "Shared") %>% as.data.frame() %>% print()

# Save annotated tables
write.csv(up_annotated,
  here("output", "placenta", "DEG_annotated_upregulated.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(dn_annotated,
  here("output", "placenta", "DEG_annotated_downregulated.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE)

cat("\nAnnotated tables saved.\n")
```

```{r}
#install.packages("ggVennDiagram")
library(ggVennDiagram)
library(ggplot2)

# ============================================================
# Venn 1 — Male tissue: upregulated at 5uM AND 20uM
# ============================================================

fig_venn_male_up <- list(
  "Male 5µM"  = male_5_up,
  "Male 20µM" = male_20_up
)

fig_venn_male <- ggVennDiagram(
  venn_male_up,
  label_alpha = 0
) +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "white", high = "#5B8DB8") +
  labs(title = "Upregulated DEGs: Male Placental Tissue") +
  theme(
    plot.title      = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 11),
    legend.position = "none"
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = 0.3))

ggsave(
  filename    = "Supplemental_Venn_Male_Upregulated.tiff",
  plot        = fig_venn_male,
  path        = here("output", "figures"),
  width       = 8, height = 5, units = "in",
  dpi         = 300, device = "tiff", compression = "lzw"
)

# ============================================================
# Venn 2 — Female tissue: downregulated at 5uM AND 20uM
# ============================================================

venn_female_dn <- list(
  "Female 5µM"  = female_5_dn,
  "Female 20µM" = female_20_dn
)

fig_venn_female <- ggVennDiagram(
  venn_female_dn,
  label_alpha = 0
) +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "white", high = "#E07BA0") +
  labs(title = "Downregulated DEGs: Female Placental Tissue") +
  theme(
    plot.title  = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 11),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.margin = margin(t=10, b = 10, l = 60, unit = "pt")
  )

print(fig_venn_female)

ggsave(
  filename    = "Supplemental_Venn_Female_Downregulated.tiff",
  plot        = fig_venn_female,
  path        = here("output", "figures"),
  width       = 8, height = 5, units = "in",
  dpi         = 300, device = "tiff", compression = "lzw"
)

# Print the actual shared genes
cat("=== MALE: Upregulated at both doses ===\n")
print(intersect(male_5_up, male_20_up))

cat("\n=== FEMALE: Downregulated at both doses ===\n")
print(intersect(female_5_dn, female_20_dn))

cat("\n=== VENN DIAGRAMS SAVED ===\n")
```
